title: Crab from Mob Vote
description: Adds a crab, which lost in the Mob Vote 2023.
body:
## Crab
A new mob - the crab. It appears in the mangrove swamp biome, most often alone. It has a passive behavior towards the player. It has 10 HP. Drop: Crab Meat
### Crab 3d model
![crab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ChMSwwdE/images/0eba37b6a07a01bd24f37c227cc6ab54bc7154f6.png)
### Crab idle animation
![crab idle animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ChMSwwdE/images/cd1b7d6f2b4e0edeeb207a31772f664773abfd63.gif)
### Crab walk animation
![crab walk animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ChMSwwdE/images/aaad6e93b8191f17fdd203f685b2a89abfc57c8a.gif)
## Crab Claw
A new tool - a crab claw. To get a crab claw, you need to wait until the baby crab matures into an adult, then it will drop 1 crab claw.

![crab claw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ChMSwwdE/images/62174a0291f3549258cae84e537e224cd0675924.png)
### What does a crab claw do?
The crab claw increases the radius of interaction with blocks by 3 blocks when it is in the mainhand or offhand, i.e.: pressing buttons, levers, opening doors and trapdoors, destroying and placing blocks, etc. But the crab claw does not increase the attack radius.
### When I interact with blocks using the crab claw, does it waste durability?
No, it doesn't waste durability.
